'''mamaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackbrain|crackbrain]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackbrain|crackbrain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mamaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæmæyæth|mæmæyæth]] || [[word:mæmæyæj|mæmæyæj]] || [[word:mæmæyæsh|mæmæyæsh]] || [[word:mæmæyæ|mæmæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamamayath|mamamayath]] || [[word:mamamayaj|mamamayaj]] || [[word:mamamayash|mamamayash]] || [[word:mamamaya|mamamaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamayath|mamayath]] || [[word:mamayaj|mamayaj]] || [[word:mamayash|mamayash]] || [[word:mamaya|mamaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamafyath|mamafyath]] || [[word:mamafyaj|mamafyaj]] || [[word:mamafyash|mamafyash]] || [[word:mamafyaf|mamafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mamayatha|mamayatha]] || [[word:mamayaja|mamayaja]] || [[word:mamayasha|mamayasha]] || [[word:mamayaka|mamayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mamayath|mamayath]] || [[word:mamayaj|mamayaj]] || [[word:mamayash|mamayash]] || [[word:mamaya|mamaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mamayathal|mamayathal]] || [[word:mamayajal|mamayajal]] || [[word:mamayashal|mamayashal]] || [[word:mamayakal|mamayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mamayathatha|mamayathatha]] || [[word:mamayajaja|mamayajaja]] || [[word:mamayashasha|mamayashasha]] || [[word:mamayaka|mamayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mamayathan|mamayathan]] || [[word:mamayajan|mamayajan]] || [[word:mamayashan|mamayashan]] || [[word:mamayakan|mamayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mamayathaoro|mamayathaoro]] || [[word:mamayajaoro|mamayajaoro]] || [[word:mamayashaoro|mamayashaoro]] || [[word:mamayakaoro|mamayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
